# Should I Go? -- Surf Conditions

> Real-time surf conditions and scoring for any beach in the world.

## What this does

Should I Go? aggregates data from multiple ocean weather sources (Open-Meteo, MET Norway, Windfinder, and more), scores surf conditions 0-100, and gives a verdict on whether it's worth paddling out. Covers wave height, wave period, swell quality, wind speed, wind direction, and wave direction.

## API for agents

Base URL: https://api.shouldigo.surf

All endpoints return JSON. No authentication required.

### Check conditions for a spot

GET /api/agent/{spotId}

Returns: score, verdict (yes/no/maybe), plain-text summary, conditions breakdown, trend forecast, and board recommendation.

### Find nearest spot

GET /api/agent/nearest

Auto-detects location by IP. Optional query params: ?lat=X&lon=Y for explicit coordinates.

### List all spots

GET /api/spots

Returns all available surf spots with id, name, and country.

### Response schema

GET /api/agent/schema

Machine-readable JSON Schema describing the agent response format.

## Example

```
GET https://api.shouldigo.surf/api/agent/pipeline
```

```json
{
  "spot": { "id": "pipeline", "name": "Pipeline", "country": "US" },
  "score": 72,
  "rating": "GOOD",
  "verdict": "Yes, go surfing.",
  "summary": "Solid chest-high waves with a decent swell. Definitely worth a session.",
  "conditions": {
    "waveHeight": { "avg": 1.4, "unit": "m" },
    "wavePeriod": { "value": 12, "unit": "s" },
    "wind": { "speed": 8, "unit": "kph", "direction": "E" },
    "waterTemp": { "value": 24, "unit": "C" }
  },
  "board": "Shortboard",
  "trend": { "direction": "improving", "bestWindow": "2:00 PM - 5:00 PM today" }
}
```

## Spot IDs

Popular spots: pipeline, bells_beach, hossegor, nazare, trestles, uluwatu, jeffreys_bay, rincon, huntington, tel_aviv

Full list: GET https://api.shouldigo.surf/api/spots

## Contact

support@shouldigo.surf
